hero.title: Where Little Hands Shape the Future of Fashion
hero.subtitle: Every child's imagination, woven into sustainable threads. Every purchase, a step toward a fairer world.

featured.heading: Where Little Hands Shape Big Ideas
featured.body: Each campaign begins in a classroom, a community center, a shelter. We collect children's artwork — raw, honest, unfiltered — and transform it into sustainable fashion that funds their future.
featured.imageAlt: Children creating art in a community workshop
featured.caption: Spring Campaign 2026 — Artwork Collection Phase

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.description: Whether you donate, shop, or share our story — every action counts.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: A publication born from the belief that every child deserves to see their creativity change the world.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Tonghua Public Welfare bridges the raw, unfiltered imagination of children with the world of sustainable fashion. We believe that the most honest art comes from the youngest hands — and that fashion can be a force for good when it carries those stories forward.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.body: Every thread traced. Every donation accounted for. We publish our supply chain because you deserve to know.

childFirst.title: Child-First Design
childFirst.body: Children are collaborators, not subjects. Their consent, privacy, and creative ownership are non-negotiable.

sustainability.title: Genuine Sustainability
sustainability.body: No greenwashing. We measure carbon footprints, use certified materials, and publish our environmental impact quarterly.

community.title: Community Roots
community.body: We work with local schools, shelters, and community centers. Fashion is the medium; community is the message.

team.title: The People Behind the Pages
team.subtitle: A small team with an oversized purpose.

workshop.alt: Children painting in a VICOO community workshop
workshop.caption: A Saturday morning workshop in Chengdu, where children paint the dreams that will become our next collection.

supplies.alt: Organic cotton and natural dye materials used in VICOO production

quote.body: We don't just make clothes. We translate the unfiltered imagination of children into something you can wear — and in doing so, we fund the education that made that imagination possible.
quote.author: Chen Wei

hero.subtitle: Each campaign is a chapter — a focused effort to connect children's art with sustainable fashion that funds real change.

stories.artworkFallback: A child's artwork, created with imagination and heart.

marquee.quote1: Every brushstroke a child makes is a window into a world they imagine
marquee.quote2: We don't just sell clothes, we sell the right to know where it came from
marquee.quote3: Sustainability begins with seeing, not just buying
marquee.quote4: A classroom becomes a gallery when we open the doors
marquee.quote5: The ocean she painted was the bluest thing she had ever seen

mock.title1: The Girl Who Drew the Ocean
mock.excerpt1: Xiao Lin had never seen the sea. But her painting of it became the most popular design in our Spring collection.
mock.excerpt2: How our production team turns deadstock fabric into limited-edition pieces that fund art workshops.
mock.pull2: 3.2 tonnes of fabric diverted from landfill
mock.excerpt3: When Dongfeng Elementary opened its doors for our workshop, nobody expected the walls to become canvases.
mock.pull3: 120 artworks created in a single afternoon
mock.excerpt4: Our new curriculum helps children understand environmental impact through creative expression.
mock.pull4: 14 schools adopted the curriculum this semester
mock.excerpt5: A transparent look at how every yuan of donation translates into real-world impact for children and communities.
mock.pull5: 92% of funds go directly to programs

featuredQuote.text: Every brushstroke a child makes is a window into a world they imagine. Our job is to make that world visible.
featuredQuote.author: Chen Wei

cta.title: Every yuan tells a story. What will yours say?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Your donation directly funds art supplies, workshops, and sustainable materials for children. We publish quarterly reports showing exactly how every yuan is spent.
faq.a2: Yes, you can choose to make your donation anonymous. Your privacy is important to us, and we respect your choice.
faq.a3: Yes, all donations to Tonghua Public Welfare are tax-deductible. You will receive an official receipt for your records.
faq.q4: How can I track my donation impact?
faq.a4: You will receive updates on how your donation is making a difference. We also publish quarterly financial reports showing the impact of all donations.

hero.title: Shop
hero.subtitle: Every garment carries a child's story. Every purchase funds the next chapter.

sustainability.certifiedMaterialsDesc: All fabrics are GOTS-certified organic cotton or recycled polyester. Every material is traced back to its source, with certificates verified by independent auditors before entering our supply chain.
sustainability.ethicalProductionDesc: Fair wages, safe conditions, full supply chain transparency.
sustainability.carbonMeasuredDesc: Every product's carbon footprint is calculated and offset.

workshop.imageAlt: Children creating artwork in a VICOO workshop
workshop.imageCaption: A Saturday morning workshop in Chengdu, where children paint the dreams that will become our next collection.

editorial.paragraph1: Every garment in this collection begins the same way — with a child, a blank page, and the freedom to imagine. We partner with schools and community centres across twelve cities, running workshops where children draw their hopes for the world.
editorial.paragraph2: Our designers then translate these raw, honest artworks into patterns, prints, and embroideries — never altering the child's original vision. The result is clothing that carries real stories, not manufactured ones.

quote.text: I drew the ocean because I want it to stay blue forever.
quote.author: Xiao Lin

hero.title: Traceability
hero.subtitle: From the child's hand that drew the design to the artisan who stitched it — follow every step of the journey.

1.description: Xiao Lin, age 8, created her ocean painting during a Saturday workshop at Dongfeng Elementary School. The artwork was selected by peer vote.
1.story: On a rainy Saturday morning, eight-year-old Xiao Lin picked up her brush and painted a whale leaping through ocean waves. Her classmates voted it best in show.

2.description: Our design team adapted the artwork for textile printing, maintaining the child's original brushstrokes and color palette. Xiao Lin approved the final design.
2.story: Lead designer Mei transformed the painting into a repeat pattern while preserving every brushstroke. Xiao Lin visited the studio and gave her final approval with a thumbs-up.

3.description: GOTS-certified organic cotton sourced from Xinjiang cooperative. Fair trade pricing verified by third-party auditor.
3.story: Harvested by hand from fields irrigated with rainwater collection systems. Each batch is tested for pesticide residue and certified organic before shipping.

4.description: Screen-printed and sewn at SA8000-certified factory. Living wages paid. Working conditions audited quarterly.
4.story: Artisan Zhang has sewn garments for 15 years. He earns above living wage with full benefits. His team printed and assembled 200 units of this design.

5.description: Quality inspection passed. Color fastness, seam strength, and sizing verified against specifications.
5.story: Inspector Li tests every garment for color fastness after 20 washes, seam strength at stress points, and dimensional accuracy within 2mm tolerance.

6.description: Shipped via consolidated freight to reduce emissions. Carbon offset purchased through certified program.
6.story: Consolidated with three other orders to fill one container. Remaining emissions offset through a verified reforestation project in Yunnan Province.

carbon.title: Carbon Footprint Comparison
carbon.subtitle: Our commitment to sustainability means measuring, reducing, and offsetting every gram of emissions.
carbon.reductionDesc: Lower emissions through organic materials, consolidated shipping, and verified carbon offsets.
carbon.explanation: Based on lifecycle analysis comparing conventional fast-fashion production with our certified supply chain. Includes raw material sourcing, manufacturing, quality control, and last-mile delivery.

certifications.title: Certifications and Standards
certifications.subtitle: Every claim we make is backed by independent third-party verification.

quote.text: If you can trace it, you can trust it. Every stitch tells a story worth knowing.
quote.author: Supply Chain Manifesto

record.title: Record
record.desc: Every step in the supply chain is documented with photos, dates, locations, and partner verification.

verify.title: Verify
verify.desc: Third-party auditors verify each record. Unverified steps are flagged transparently.

publish.title: Publish
publish.desc: The complete journey is published on our platform for every customer to inspect.

gots.title: GOTS Certified
gots.desc: Global Organic Textile Standard verified organic fibers and responsible processing.

fairTrade.title: Fair Trade Verified
fairTrade.desc: Living wages, safe conditions, and ethical treatment for every worker.

carbonNeutral.title: Carbon Neutral
carbonNeutral.desc: Operations offset through verified reforestation and renewable energy.

childSafe.title: Child-Safe Production
childSafe.desc: Full compliance with child protection regulations and consent protocols.

hero.title: Contact
hero.subtitle: We read every message. Whether you have a question, a partnership idea, or a story to share — we're listening.
hero.welcome: Whether you want to donate, collaborate, or just say hello — we'd love to hear from you.

items.question: How can I make a donation?
items.answer: You can donate through our secure online platform, WeChat Pay, or bank transfer. Every contribution directly supports children's art programs and sustainable fashion initiatives.

items.question: How do I submit my child's artwork?
items.answer: Visit our Campaigns page to find active art drives. You can upload artwork directly through our platform or send it to us via email. All submissions are reviewed within 3 business days.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: Once your order is confirmed, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also check your order status anytime through your account dashboard under My Orders.

items.question: Are there volunteer opportunities?
items.answer: Yes. We welcome volunteers for workshops, event coordination, translation, and digital outreach. Send us a message with your interests and availability, and we will match you with the right opportunity.

items.question: How can my organization partner with you?
items.answer: We partner with schools, NGOs, and businesses that share our values. Select Partnership as your subject below and tell us about your organization. Our team will respond within 48 hours.
